title: Google Voice Integration?
excerpt: Monday.com already integrates with so many gsuite products - would love to see an integration with Google Voice (esp. for the CRM module) to allow calling/texting right from the Emails & Activities area. Or even just nat…

posts.author: amltcp360 (Adrianne Troia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday.com already integrates with so many gsuite products - would love to see an integration with Google Voice (esp. for the CRM module) to allow calling/texting right from the Emails & Activities area. Or even just native capability to send SMS from the Emails & Activities section to a phone number listed in the pulse.

Anyone know of any other integrations that could send texts from the platform?

posts.author: Carrie (Carrie Downey)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be amazing! Twilio seems to be the only option right now. I’m a user of Twilio and it’s very complex to get set up for one number, let alone setting up your whole team with individual numbers to call and text from.

posts.author: PabloO (Pablo Ortega)
posts.cookedHtml: we would also like this integration to happen, Google Voice with Monday.com

posts.author: JungleJamJohn (John Wheatley)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! I need this in the basic boards/work flows asap

posts.author: cdimamaglow (cdimamaglow)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! We’re a non-profit that uses Monday for client management and it would be AMAZING to integrate our google voice to send auto-reminders to clients about appointments!!!

posts.author: JungleJamJohn (John Wheatley)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, please integrate with Google Voice!

posts.author: MagdalenaBachinger (Magdalena Bachinger)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are currently considering building an integration for Google Voice. Since Google does not have an API for it and doesn’t offer any other integrations (e.g., Make, Zapier), we are thinking of creating a workaround.

We are very interested in understanding the specific problems you encounter in your workflows so we can address them effectively.

Please reach out to magdalena.bachinger@cdtm.de. I would be happy to schedule a quick call with you.

posts.author: Michelleatpm (Michelle Berrisford)
posts.cookedHtml: yes! upvoting this! All current SMS/phone tools are extremely complex. Hate using Twilio! This is a big opportunity to bridge this gap!

posts.author: RaquelSDEV (Raquel Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml: We really need this integration! We love Google and We love Monday and we would love for them to work together!

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Adrianne Troia,

Great idea! While Monday.com doesn’t natively integrate with Google Voice I can build a custom Make.com automation to bridge the gap, allowing you to call or send SMS directly from the Emails & Activities section in Monday.com.

Here’s how it would work:

Google Voice API Integration – Trigger calls/texts from Monday.com CRM.
Auto-Logging Communications – Store SMS/call history inside Monday.com for easy tracking.
Alternative SMS Options – If Google Voice API is limited, we can use
Twilio, ClickSend, or Plivo for texting.
User-Friendly Setup– Simple buttons in Monday.com to initiate communication instantly.

Lets Schedule to call

posts.author: thehearthutah (Tyler)
posts.cookedHtml: YESSS!!! Integrate Google Voice PLEASE! Monday already has sooo many google products so let’s get this added to the lineup. It would make Google product users life SO MUCH EASIER.

posts.author: davidpriceav (David Price)
posts.cookedHtml: Upvote. This would be a game changer.
